_comment: Payer preferences, registration, and the payer-verification handshake all go through the MCP service router — never raw endpoints. Identity (biller_id, payer_id) is bound to the capability token, never a tool argument: verify_payer_account matches an account number and mints a payer-bound token that the payer-scoped read/update tools require, while register_payer creates a new payer under the biller bound to a write-capable biller capability.

function.name: verify_payer_account
function.description: Match an account number to a registered payer for the capability's biller. On success returns a payer-bound capability token that payer-scoped tools (get_payer_profile, update_payer_preferences, create_payment_intent, submit_payment) require. Backed by the MCP router tool verify_payer_account. The payer id is bound server-side and can never be passed as an argument.

capability_token.description: Short-lived biller capability issued by IC orchestration for this run.

account_number.description: The account number the payer supplied to prove ownership.

function.name: get_payer_profile
function.description: Read the verified payer's profile and preferences (autopay, paperless, channels, payment_day). Backed by the MCP router tool get_payer_profile. Requires the payer-bound capability token returned by verify_payer_account; guest payers have none.

function.name: update_payer_preferences
function.description: Update the verified payer's notification/autopay preferences. Backed by the MCP router tool update_payer_preferences. Requires a write-capable, payer-bound capability. Only supplied fields change; omit a field to leave it unchanged.

capability_token.description: Write-capable payer-bound capability returned by verify_payer_account.

autopay.description: Enable/disable autopay. Omit or null to leave unchanged.

paperless.description: Enable/disable paperless billing. Omit or null to leave unchanged.

payment_day.description: Day of month (1-28) to run autopay. Omit or null to leave unchanged.

function.name: register_payer
function.description: Register a payer account for the capability's biller. Backed by the MCP router tool register_payer. Call ONLY after explicit payer opt-in — registration is offered, never imposed, and guest pay must remain available. The biller tenant is bound to the capability token; you never pass biller_id.

capability_token.description: Write-capable biller capability issued by IC orchestration for this run.

phone.description: The payer's phone number. Omit or null if not provided.

account_numbers.description: External biller account numbers to link to this payer.

autopay.description: Enable autopay. Omit or null to leave at registration defaults.

paperless.description: Enable paperless billing. Omit or null to leave at registration defaults.

payment_day.description: Preferred day of month (1-28) for autopay. Omit or null to leave unset.
